positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for pos
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u26,axiom,
    ~grew_up_health_conscious_home(taylor)).

cnf(u29,axiom,
    ~disregard_wellbeing(taylor)).

cnf(u22,negated_conjecture,
    ~eat_salad_regularly(taylor)).

cnf(u15,axiom,
    ~eat_salad_regularly(X0) | very_conscious(X0)).

cnf(u17,axiom,
    ~disregard_wellbeing(X0) | ~very_conscious(X0)).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    ~grew_up_health_conscious_home(X0) | eat_salad_regularly(X0)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define fulfill_daily_nutrition(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define visit_gym_daily(X0) := $false
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
